public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as quartermaster.
manner: Treats exchange as a social instrument as much as an economic one, reading appetite and hesitation alike. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a quartermaster still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of quartermaster in and around Hearthcoil Commune, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Hearthcoil Commune workable through the obligations of quartermaster while managing the immediate pressure of coil failure in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must balance relationship value against immediate margin without losing either entirely. Around Hearthcoil Commune, that usually means carrying coil failure, ration conflict, out-migration without letting the role of quartermaster visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Ilya Snowveil can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.
Ilya Snowveil will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Ilya Snowveil read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation. In Hearthcoil Commune, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Communal Ration Allocators.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Hearthcoil Commune: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
